title: USS Mindoro
summary:
USS Mindoro may refer to the following ships of the United States Navy:

USS Mindoro (1899), was a gunboat in use in the Philippines from 1899 to 1911
USS Mindoro (YAG‑15), was a freighter purchased in 1942 and in service until 1945
USS Mindoro (CVE-120), was an escort carrier in service from 1945 to 1955
text:

USS Mindoro (CVE-120), was an escort carrier in service from 1945 to 1955
